instructions.name: accrue
docs: Permissionless dC_t accrual. Anyone can trigger to release tokens
from the pool as L_eff decreases over time.

instructions.name: attach_leg_to_group
docs: Attach an existing binary Market PDA to a leg slot of a GroupMarket.
Enforces same authority, same end_ts, and seed price = 10_000/N bps.

instructions.name: cancel_group_market
docs: Cancel an abandoned GroupMarket past expiration. Marks it resolved with
`NO_WINNING_LEG`, so attached legs can then be finalized as `Side::No`
via `resolve_group_leg`. Authority-only.

instructions.name: claim_committer
docs: Committer claims back their USDC after launch. (v1: returns the commit
1:1; v2 will distribute LP shares of the launched market pro-rata.)

accounts.name: vault_collateral
docs: PDA-owned vault collateral ATA — source of the USDC backing transfer.

accounts.name: market
docs: The launched binary market — must match `vault.market`.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market's USDC vault — destination of the backing transfer.

accounts.name: user_yes
docs: User's YES ATA — init if missing.

accounts.name: user_no
docs: User's NO ATA — init if missing.

instructions.name: claim_committer_group
docs: Per-leg claim for multi-outcome vault committers (v2): mints leg
YES tokens 1:1 with their commit on that leg, and transfers the
backing USDC from the commitment vault to the leg's market vault.
Call once per leg the committer has stake in.

accounts.name: group_market
docs: The wrapping GroupMarket — verified against vault.group_market.

accounts.name: market
docs: Leg `leg_index`'s binary market — verified against group.legs[i].

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Leg market's USDC vault — destination of the backing transfer.

accounts.name: user_yes
docs: User's YES ATA for this leg — init if missing.

instructions.name: claim_lp_residuals
docs: Claim pending YES+NO residuals accrued to an LP position.
Allowed at any time, including after resolution.

instructions.name: claim_winnings
docs: Burn all user tokens (winning + losing), pay winning side at 1 USDC each.
Only callable post-resolution. Burns both sides atomically.

accounts.name: user_yes
docs: User's YES token account.

accounts.name: user_no
docs: User's NO token account.

accounts.name: user_collateral
docs: User's USDC token account.

instructions.name: deposit_liquidity
docs: Deposit USDC as liquidity. First deposit bootstraps L_0 at 50/50 price.
Subsequent deposits scale L_0 proportionally to preserve the current price.

instructions.name: initialize_group_market
docs: Create a GroupMarket wrapping `leg_count` binary markets as a
categorical (multi-outcome) prediction market. Legs are attached
separately via `attach_leg_to_group` and must each be seeded at
`10_000 / leg_count` bps so Σ p_i = 1 at open.

instructions.name: initialize_market
docs: Create a new prediction market with YES/NO mints, a USDC vault,
and Metaplex token metadata for wallet display.
`initial_price_bps` seeds the YES price at first deposit. Pass `0` for
the legacy 50/50 default. For multi-outcome groups, pass `10_000 / N`.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: The collateral mint (USDC or mock). Must have 6 decimals.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Open a new Commitment Vault. Anyone can call. Aggregates crowd commits
before the market exists; the launch price is computed from the
commit ratio.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: USDC (or mock) mint. Must be 6 decimals.

accounts.name: vault_collateral
docs: PDA-owned token account that aggregates all commits.

instructions.name: initialize_vault_group
docs: Open a multi-outcome Commitment Vault. Authority picks the leg names
(2..=8). Crowd then commits per-leg with `vault_commit_group`.

accounts.name: vault_collateral
docs: PDA-owned token account that aggregates all commits.

instructions.name: launch_vault_group_leg
docs: Step 2 of launch (run once per leg): create the leg's binary Market +
mints + vault + Metaplex metadata, then attach it to the GroupMarket.
Each leg market is seeded at `leg_totals[i] / total` bps.

instructions.name: launch_vault_group_market
docs: Step 1 of launch: create the wrapping GroupMarket. Permissionless.
Refuses if any leg has < 100 bps share (the underlying pm-AMM floor).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Permissionless caller — pays rent.

instructions.name: launch_vault_market
docs: Launch the underlying pm-AMM market once commit_end_ts has passed and
total ≥ min_total. Permissionless. The caller pays the rent of the
new Market + mints + vault + Metaplex metadata accounts.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Permissionless caller — pays the rent for the new Market/mints/vault.

accounts.name: market
docs: New Market PDA — derived from `market_id` (typically vault_id reused).

instructions.name: redeem_pair
docs: Burn 1 YES + 1 NO to receive 1 USDC. Always valid, pre- or post-resolution.

instructions.name: refund_commit
docs: Refund a committer 1:1 if the vault never launched.

instructions.name: refund_commit_group
docs: Refund a committer 1:1 if the multi-outcome vault never launched.

instructions.name: resolve_group
docs: Resolve a GroupMarket: authority picks the winning leg.
Must run after expiration and after all legs are attached.

instructions.name: resolve_group_leg
docs: Cascade-resolve one leg of a resolved GroupMarket. Permissionless:
the group's `winning_leg` is the source of truth (winning → Yes,
all others → No).

instructions.name: resolve_market
docs: Resolve the market after expiration. Authority-only.
Triggers final accrual and sets the winning side.

instructions.name: suggest_l_zero
docs: View-only: compute the optimal L_0 for a given USDC budget.
Emits a `LZeroSuggestion` event. Composable via CPI for auto-LP vaults.

instructions.name: swap
docs: Swap between USDC, YES, and NO tokens (6 directions).
Updates reserves and enforces the pm-AMM invariant.

instructions.name: vault_commit
docs: Commit USDC on YES or NO. Anyone, any number of times, until
commit_end_ts. Min commit: 1 USDC.

accounts.name: vault_collateral
docs: Vault's PDA-owned collateral ATA — receives the transferred USDC.

accounts.name: user_collateral
docs: User's USDC source.

accounts.name: commit_position
docs: CommitPosition tracks this signer's commits on this vault.
init_if_needed: first commit creates it, subsequent commits update.

instructions.name: vault_commit_group
docs: Commit USDC on a specific leg of a multi-outcome vault. Same rules as
`vault_commit`: anyone, any number of times, until commit_end_ts.

instructions.name: withdraw_liquidity
docs: Withdraw LP shares: auto-claims pending residuals, then mints
proportional YES+NO tokens from the pool reserves.

errors.name: InvalidWinningMint
errors.msg: Invalid winning mint: does not match resolved side

errors.name: InvalidLegCount
errors.msg: Invalid leg count: must be between 2 and MAX_LEGS

errors.name: InvalidLegIndex
errors.msg: Invalid leg index: out of bounds for this group

errors.name: LegMismatch
errors.msg: Leg market does not match the slot stored on the group

errors.name: GroupIncomplete
errors.msg: Group market has missing legs (must attach all N legs first)

errors.name: LegEndTsMismatch
errors.msg: Leg market end_ts does not match group end_ts

errors.name: LegMustCascadeResolve
errors.msg: Leg attached to a group must resolve via resolve_group_leg

errors.name: GroupCancelTooEarly
errors.msg: Group can only be cancelled after expiration

errors.name: CommitPhaseClosed
errors.msg: Vault commit phase has not started or already ended

errors.name: CommitPhaseNotEnded
errors.msg: Vault commit phase has not yet ended

errors.name: InvalidCommitDuration
errors.msg: Invalid commit duration: must be 1 min ≤ d ≤ 7 days

errors.name: InvalidMarketDuration
errors.msg: Invalid market duration: must be 5 min ≤ d ≤ 30 days

errors.name: RefundNotAvailable
errors.msg: Refund only available if vault is unlaunched and either commit ended below threshold OR commit ended without launch

errors.name: NoCommitFunds
errors.msg: Commit position has no funds to claim or refund

errors.name: VaultGroupLegOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Vault group leg index out of bounds (>= leg_count)

errors.name: VaultGroupNotAllLegsLaunched
errors.msg: Vault group: not all legs launched yet

errors.name: VaultGroupInsufficientLegShare
errors.msg: Vault group leg has insufficient share (< 100 bps after rounding)

errors.name: VaultGroupNotInitialized
errors.msg: Vault group: group market not yet created

errors.name: InvalidLegName
errors.msg: Invalid leg name: must be 1-32 bytes

errors.name: InvalidMarket
errors.msg: Market account does not match the one stored on the vault

errors.name: InvalidVault
errors.msg: Market vault token account does not match market.vault

fields.name: name
docs: UTF-8 zero-padded vault name (becomes the launched market's name).

fields.name: commit_end_ts
docs: When the commit phase ends. After this, no more commits, launch
becomes available, refund becomes available.

fields.name: market_end_ts
docs: Duration of the launched market (added to launch time to get end_ts).

fields.name: min_total
docs: Below this threshold, launch is refused → committers must refund.

fields.name: winning_price_bps
docs: Set at launch to the initial_price_bps computed from the commit ratio.
Kept for transparency post-launch.

fields.name: market
docs: The launched Market PDA. `Pubkey::default()` pre-launch.

fields.name: lp_position
docs: The LpPosition PDA owned by the vault (seeds [b"lp", market, vault]).
Holds the LP shares minted at launch; claim_committer distributes them
pro-rata. `Pubkey::default()` pre-launch.

fields.name: name
docs: UTF-8 zero-padded vault name (becomes the launched GroupMarket name).

fields.name: leg_count
docs: 2..=MAX_VAULT_LEGS.

fields.name: leg_names
docs: Per-leg human-readable label (e.g. "Trump", "Biden", "Other"). Used to
derive the launched market names. UTF-8, zero-padded, max 32 bytes.

fields.name: leg_totals
docs: Per-leg committed USDC totals (raw u64, 6 decimals).

fields.name: group_market_initialized
docs: True iff the wrapping GroupMarket account has been created.

fields.name: legs_launched
docs: Number of legs whose underlying Market has been launched + attached.
Once `legs_launched == leg_count` the vault is fully launched and
`claim_committer_group` / `refund_commit_group` is gated accordingly.

fields.name: group_market
docs: GroupMarket PDA. `Pubkey::default()` until launch_vault_group_market.

fields.name: leg_count
docs: Actual number of legs (≤ MAX_LEGS).

fields.name: legs
docs: Pubkeys of attached binary Market PDAs. Slots [0..leg_count) must be
populated before resolution. Pubkey::default() = empty slot.

fields.name: winning_leg
docs: Winning leg index (0..leg_count). NO_WINNING_LEG (0xFF) = unresolved.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable group name (UTF-8, zero-padded).

fields.name: total_seeded_bps
docs: Cumulative bps seeded across all attached legs. Incremented by
`attach_leg_to_group`, checked by `resolve_group` so Σ p_i ≈ 1 at
settlement (paper invariant for categorical markets).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved for future expansion.

types.name: SwapDirection
docs: Direction of a swap. Six combinations covering all USDC/YES/NO pairs.
